creator: jacula@gmail.com
text:
I'm sorry for yesterday, but I was a little tired and in any way my problem
reports are always a little chaotic :-); This is typical of a nerd.
At this point I decided to send the same patch encoded with the uuencode
utility. This patch isn't so important because it eliminates only some
warnings. The attachment codes the file:

x11-toolkits/hs-wxcore/files/patch-wxc_include_wxc_glue.h

and you can decode it with uudecode.

I hope this is it!

Bye JM
